name: zinput_directinput_report_error
description: zInput::DI_ReportError returns success for DI_OK, maps failing DirectInput HRESULTs to report text, and reports failures through zError::ReportOld.
known_limits: Reviewed VC byte comparison from python tools/recoil_vc6_verify.py zinput_directinput_report_error failed under VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4: 445 unmasked mismatches, 16 relocation-masked bytes, BN size 469, VC object size 96, 1 trailing VC NOP trimmed; see build/vc6-verify/zinput_directinput_report_error/verify/472490_byte_triage.txt.

The reviewed byte drift is source-organization shape: the current source factors DirectInput HRESULT-name mapping into GetDirectInputErrorName, while the original inlines the ordered compare tree inside zInput::DI_ReportError.
